CREATE TABLE csv_test (col1 VARCHAR, col2 VARCHAR, col3 VARCHAR);
CREATE PROCEDURE test_csv_cols_def (IN file_name VARCHAR) BEGIN SELECT csv_cols_def(file_name); END;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_csv AS SELECT * FROM csv_test;
SELECT col1, col2 FROM temp_csv WHERE col3 = 'value3';
CREATE PROCEDURE complex_csv_test (IN file_name VARCHAR) BEGIN SELECT csv_cols_def(file_name) AS col_def, COUNT(*) FROM temp_csv WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY col_def; END;
WITH csv_columns AS (SELECT DISTINCT csv_cols_def('tmp/MyContacts.csv') AS col_def) SELECT * FROM csv_columns WHERE col_def IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_csv_test AS SELECT csv_cols_def('tmp/AnotherContacts.csv') AS columns_def;
SELECT col_def FROM another_csv_test WHERE LENGTH(col_def) > 5;
CREATE TABLE test_csv_joins AS SELECT t1.col1, t2.col2 FROM temp_csv t1 JOIN another_csv_test t2 ON t1.col1 = t2.columns_def;
SELECT * FROM test_csv_joins WHERE col1 LIKE '%value%';
INSERT INTO temp_csv SELECT DISTINCT t.col1, t.col2 FROM (SELECT csv_cols_def('tmp/DuplicateContacts.csv') AS col_def) AS t;
